# Data format

**Data field**

A 32-bit integer indicating the format of the stored data.

## Overview

The value of this field is copied from the data-format field of the sound sample description.

## Data fields

- **Size**: An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the format atom.
- **Type**: An unsigned 32-bit field.

items.description: An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the format atom.
